title: Gyro
description:
Abandoned deep in space, you play as Gyro—a small utility bot tasked to clean up the remainder of what once was. Along your journey, you will gain new items to add to Gyro's arsenal of tools. But don't think you're getting off easy—your tasks will also become more and more challenging as you help discover the nature of Gyro's predicament. Featuring the music of A Life Elided, Gyro offers up whimsical, mysterious, sci-fi-based puzzles that will keep you wanting more.

Gyro supports controller or keyboard & mouse that allow you to roll around and use the tools listed on the left side of your screen. Consisting of six stages, you traverse from room to room, completing numerous tasks. Once all tasks in a room are complete, you'll be able to proceed to the next one. Upon reaching the end of a stage, you will face a boss. Defeating the boss will potentially give you a new tool and allow you to continue on to the next stage (once your other tasks are complete). You can save your progress through the menu—or autosave has you covered.
description_short: Abandoned deep in space, Gyro is a small utility bot tasked to clean up what once was. Along your journey, discover an arsenal of increasing tools and challenges. Featuring the music of A Life Elided, Gyro offers up whimsical, mysterious, sci-fi-based puzzles that will keep you wanting more.
